content: Domain-boundary check: orchestrator-role/SKILL.md and earned-constraints.md are Platform/PMCR-O files, not a domain's own SKILL.md. cto's scope explicitly covers PMCR-O loop/skill-pack design and validation -- in-bounds, no Law 4 violation.

Re-read both target files on disk; content matches cto/67f24fd5's 01-make.jsonl claims exactly (Law 2 path, Usage heading + sentence, four Reference Files paths; EC-012 entry appended, no existing entries edited).

git status --short confirms scope: exactly orchestrator-role/SKILL.md and earned-constraints.md modified, plus untracked trail directories (2b5293a5 disposition.json, cto/67f24fd5, this ceo trail) which .gitignore does not exclude and prior history (10ec5d3) confirms trails are tracked in this repo.
Executed git add + commit + push for the two source files plus the trail directories as the human-authorized TYPE1 action.
